title: Plaid API count parameter not recognized as integer
symptom: When using the Plaid API sandbox, an error occurs stating 'count must be an integer' despite providing an integer value.
not_this_if: Count parameter is correctly formatted as an integer in the API call
root_cause: The Plaid API expects the count parameter to be explicitly parsed as an integer. If the value is provided as a string, even if it represents an integer, the API will throw an error indicating that the count is not an integer.
fix_steps: Change the count value to use an expression
Wrap the count value in parseInt, e.g., {{parseInt(10)}}
Save the changes and retry the API call
agent_instruction: Wrap the count value in parseInt to ensure it is treated as an integer.
